ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the client's contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client's contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who owns the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the metric belongs to */,
  "qnt_bugs" INTEGER /* Number of bugs found in the project */,
  "qnt_tc_release" INTEGER /* Number of test cases released in the project */,
  "qnt_tc_sw" INTEGER /* Number of test cases in software in the project */,
  "qnt_bugs_client" INTEGER /* Number of bugs reported by the client in the project */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the project */,
  "burn_rate" REAL /* Burn rate of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., open, in progress, done) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer assigned to the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., open, in progress, done) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the developer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the bug belongs to */,
  "bug_name" TEXT /* Name of the bug */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who reported the bug */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bug (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the bug (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bug (e.g., open, in progress, done) */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the bug (e.g., functional, performance) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the bug (e.g., ui, backend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_fixes" (
  "fix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug fix */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bug being fixed */,
  "fix_name" TEXT /* Name of the bug fix */,
  "fixed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who fixed the bug */,
  "fix_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was fixed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patch_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patch release */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the patch release belongs to */,
  "release_name" TEXT /* Name of the patch release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the patch release */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patch release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the test case belongs to */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_scripts" (
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case script */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case the script belongs to */,
  "script_name" TEXT /* Name of the script */,
  "script_type" TEXT /* Type of the script (e.g., ui, api) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_scripts_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the environment belongs to */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case being executed */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date of the test run */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test run (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment the test was run in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_results_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., requirements, design) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_base_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge base article */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the article belongs to */,
  "article_name" TEXT /* Name of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_articles_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug update */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bug being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who made the update */,
  "update_comment" TEXT /* Comment describing the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_update_by FOREIGN KEY ("update_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)
